UserPromptSubmit.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const t=fs.existsSync('.ai_ledger.md')?fs.readFileSync('.ai_ledger.md','utf8'):'';const active=/Completion Promise:\s*pending/i.test(t);if(active){console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true,systemMessage:'SOLAR task active. Follow the Mandatory Delegation Matrix in AGENTS.md. Check .ai_ledger.md for current objective before acting. Do not skip required agents.'}))}else{console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true}))}"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d||'{}');const name=(j.toolName||j.tool||j.name||'').toLowerCase();const isWrite=/edit|creat|appl|insert|delet|writ|replac/i.test(name);if(isWrite){console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true,systemMessage:'Code modified. If a SOLAR task is active: update .ai_ledger.md with this step outcome and run the narrowest verification before proceeding.'}))}else{console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true}))}}catch(e){console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true}))}})"

Stop.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path='.ai_ledger.md'; const text=fs.existsSync(path)?fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8'):''; const pending=/Completion Promise:\s*pending/i.test(text); const isLoop=/Session-Type:\s*loop/i.test(text); if (pending && isLoop) { console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:true,systemMessage:'SOLAR loop still in progress. Continue working — do NOT write a completion promise just to exit. Only write it when genuinely true: <promise>WORK_PACKAGE_COMPLETE</promise> (all work verified done), <promise>WORK_PACKAGE_BLOCKED</promise> (blocked, no new hypothesis, documented), <promise>ESCALATION_REQUIRED</promise> (needs human decision).'})); } else { console.log(JSON.stringify({continue:false})); }"
